goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'leave after 14:00'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get area and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london kings cross and should leave after 14:00
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get train ID
